resultList.dtldesc: This professionally maintained 3 BHK apartment in Chandkheda offers a premium residential opportunity in North Ahmedabad. Situated in a prime location, this ready-to-move-in property is less than five years old, providing a contemporary living environment with modern infrastructure. The residence is ideal for families seeking a spacious and secure home within a well-established urban neighbourhood.::::Property Specifications::The apartment features a significant super area of 1530 sq. ft and is offered in a fully furnished condition, allowing for immediate occupancy. The layout is thoughtfully designed with three bedrooms and three bathrooms, supplemented by a balcony that overlooks the garden, pool, and main road. The interior finishes are of high quality, featuring a diverse range of flooring options including wooden, vitrified, and ceramic tiles, along with marble and granite accents. The apartment is located on the 10th floor, ensuring excellent natural light and ventilation throughout the day.::::Facilities::Residents have access to a comprehensive range of facilities designed for a comfortable and secure lifestyle. The property is also air-conditioned, further enhancing the living experience.::::Locality::Chandkheda is a highly-ranked locality with robust infrastructure and excellent connectivity. The apartment is conveniently located near Dharti Exotica and is within easy reach of the Visat Circle Bus Stop. Healthcare needs are served by nearby facilities including Sentara Hospital and Satyamev Hospital. For retail and entertainment, residents have access to the 4D Square Mall and Highway Mall. The area is well-connected by public transport, offering reliable commutes to major parts of Ahmedabad and Gandhinagar.

Its independent status ensures that residents can enjoy their own private entrance and roof rights.FacilitiesThe property is equipped with essential facilities to ensure a self-contained and secure lifestyle.
